title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates
company: Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates in Agra is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates:
Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates!
